Id1.text: Anaheim is a Californian city in Orange County. It is led by the United States House of Representatives.

Id2.text: The United States House of Representatives (in the United States), leads Anaheim, a city in Orange County which is part of California.

Id3.text: The United States House of Representatives leads Anaheim, which is part of Orange County, California.
